title: Where to Purchase Axie Infinity (AXS): Full Guide
content:
Axie Infinity serves as a cornerstone for gaming-focused crypto, capturing interest through its unique economic design. With the current market cap at $233.13M, many participants seek to understand the acquisition process in the context of a 58.1% BTC dominance environment. | Metric | Details | | :--- | :--- | | Live Price | $1.37 | | Risk Score | 6 (Medium) | | Market Rank | #165 | | 24H Change | -1.55% | | Date | April 27, 2026 |

## Buying Axie Infinity Safely The asset is listed on major exchanges such as Binance, Coinbase, and Bybit. Before proceeding, assess your risk tolerance using our TokenRadar Risk Score of 6, which indicates a medium-risk classification.

## The Step-by-Step Process 1. Register: Select a reputable exchange and complete the mandatory KYC verification. 2. Fund: Deposit fiat currency or transfer crypto assets to your exchange wallet. 3. Trade: Navigate to the AXS/USDT or AXS/BTC pair to place your trade. 4. Execute: Utilize limit orders for price control or market orders for instant execution.

## Security Considerations While exchanges are convenient, long-term storage is best suited for secure hardware wallets. Never store significant holdings on centralized platforms. Compare custody options against your personal security requirements, much like evaluating infrastructure protocols like Helium or BUILDon.

## Tax and Regulatory Note Ensure you keep records of all transactions for tax reporting purposes in your jurisdiction. Taxes on crypto vary significantly, and it is essential to consult with a local professional.

## FAQ * Where is the best place to buy AXS? Major exchanges like Binance and Coinbase are the standard platforms for liquidity. * What is the Risk Score for AXS? The TokenRadar Risk Score is 6, categorized as medium. * Do I need a specific wallet? A hardware wallet is recommended for long-term storage. * Is buying AXS legal? Crypto regulation depends on your country; always verify local laws.
